title: Yevheniia & Olena's Bern Passport
subtitle: A Self-Guided Walking & Wonder Map · Hidden gems of Bern
description: Explore Bern and all its hidden gems with this self-guided walking map. Tap a stamp on the map, or pick a stop from the list below to fly straight to it. Tap the circle next to a name to mark it visited as you go.
howTo: Tap a stamp on the map, or pick a stop from the list below to fly straight to it. Tap the circle next to a name to mark it visited as you go.

footer.built: Stamps are hand-drawn vector illustrations · Built with React & Tailwind
